title: Evolution 2.0 — Computational Discovery Packet (NOT A PRIZE SUBMISSION)
disclaimer: This packet documents internal Construction A+ metrics and rule-fit analysis. It is NOT submitted as a prize entry. Sponsor clarification is required before any entry under the $100k Initial Discovery tier.

organic.substrate: Discrete 3D branching growth (v3_6_core) with explicit pre-step maintenance energy injection
organic.readout: Surrogate PEFP coupling matrix + PCA (k=14) + Construction A+ ternary quantization
required_disclosures: Collision-free subset selected post-hoc from pool_size=56
PEFP model fit on evaluation pool before IC filtering
Maintenance injection is augmented dynamics, not pure growth
Replay probe uses energy noise only (0.05/0.10/0.15)

chemical.substrate: Continuous Hopfield ODE with Hill-type activations (in-silico only)
chemical.readout: PCA projection + ternary Construction A+ quantization on settled states
chemical.note: Computational associative-memory baseline. Not wet chemistry. Not a prize entry.

falsifiable_tests.organic: Energy-noise replay on curated 33-IC subset; full pool metrics in organic_pool_disclosure.json
falsifiable_tests.chemical: Replay with null/random/shuffled controls (all 0% false positive in reported run)

next_action: Send sponsor clarification request. Do not submit as prize entry until written ruling received.
